Cynthia Lee, plaintiff and moving party in Propria Persona

Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant William Newlin's motion to compel attendance at deposition is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant within 5 days of notice of this order to schedule her deposition. The deposition shall be completed by November 1, 2007. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $250 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. = (610/BEC)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Defendants' Discovery Request; Requests For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant William Newlin's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $250 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. = (610/BEC)
